plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the cached selectors for 'Last Name' could not find a matching element on the page. Visual evidence shows the form now displays 'Your Name' instead of separate name fields.
observedIndicators: UI structure mismatch: screenshot shows 'Your Name' but selector looks for 'Last Name'
flexible semantic intent detected in overallObjective

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache to handle UI layout change.
remediationSteps.details: The page.ai cache contains selectors for a 'Last Name' field that is no longer present in the current UI version. Clear the cache to allow the autonomous agent to re-map the form fields (e.g., 'Your Name').

remediationSteps.summary: Retry test to regenerate deterministic instructions.
remediationSteps.details: Run the test again after clearing the cache. The autonomous nature of the instruction will allow it to adapt to the modified form fields without code changes.

plan.notes: The failure is a classic stale cache scenario where the UI layout changed between runs. The 'Your Name' field in the failure screenshot replaces the 'Last Name' field expected by the deterministic cache. Since the overall objective is semantically flexible ('Fill out all survey questions'), clearing the cache and retrying will allow the agent to adapt to the new UI.
